claimflight.leave.warn: Flight will be disabled in {0} seconds.
claimflight.question: Allow which players to fly?
claimflight.whitelist.hint: To edit whitelist: /{0} flag {1} claimFlight.whitelist add <name|uid>
claimflight.wl.needtarget: Missing player name/uid. Use: whitelist add <name|uid>
cmd.ac.desc: AXIN CLAIMS — mod commands. Use /ac for help.
cmd.claims.desc: Exports the full list of world claims into ClaimsRegistry.json.
cmd.flags.desc: Shows effective flags/rules for the current claim.
cmd.flagset.desc: Sets a flag for a claim alias (and auto-reload).
cmd.id.desc: Shows current claim id and registers it (also auto alias).
cmd.list.desc: Shows all registered claims (alias and TP coords).
cmd.player.desc: Shows registered claims for a player name.
cmd.reload.desc: Reloads Config + Registry + Alias + Lang from disk.
cmd.settp.desc: Sets TP for current claim to your position.
cmd.sync.desc: Reloads Config + Registry + Alias + Lang from disk.
cmd.tp.desc: Teleports to the TP of a registered claim alias.
err.claim.detect.flags: [AxinClaimsRules] ERROR: could not detect current claim (flags).
err.claim.detect.help: [AxinClaimsRules] ERROR: could not detect current claim (see server-debug.log).
err.folder.name: Missing folder name.
err.no.priv: You don't have privileges for this command.
err.no.priv.flags: You do not have permission to change flags.
flags.notinclaim: You are not inside any claim.
warn.flag.reload.failed: [AxinClaimsRules] WARN: flag saved, but reload failed (see server-debug.log).
